subject: UX & Research
title: North Star Metric
description: A quick, practical guide to North Star Metric.

hook.text: Spotify's north star: 'time spent listening.' One metric that reflects both user value and business health.

buildup.text: A north star metric captures the core value your product delivers. It aligns every team toward one outcome.

discovery.text: Airbnb's: 'nights booked.' Facebook's: 'daily active users.' Each reflects what success means for that product.

twist.text: A north star can be wrong. If Spotify optimizes time, autoplay pads the metric without adding real value.

climax.text: The best north stars balance user value and business value. If one grows without the other, the metric is flawed.

punchline.text: One metric for user value plus business health. That's your north star.

quiz.question: What makes a good north star metric?
options: It reflects both user value and business health in a single measurable number
It should be a financial metric like revenue
It must increase every month without exception
